data.title: Nvidia Supplier TSMC Reports Q3 Revenue, Earnings Beat Amid Rising Demand For AI Chips
data.description: TSMC's earnings came as a welcome relief after ASML spooked AI hardware manufacturers with a lackluster outlook.

data.title: Donald Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Off To A Slow Start — Raises Just 4% Of The Token Fundraising Target
data.description: Donald Trump-backed cryptocurrency project World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has been off to a slow start, managing to raise just 4% of its token presale target within the first 48 hours of its launch.

data.title: Alcoa, Netflix And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Mark Cuban Battles Former Trump Advisor For Suggesting A 'Child Could Do' American Auto Workers Job: Paul Krugman Chimes In On The Controversy — 'He Still Thinks It's 1965'
data.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban and former President Donald Trump advisor Stephen Miller engaged in a heated exchange Wednesday over Trump's recent comments about auto manufacturing and workers' skills, bringing attention to the complexities of modern automotive production in America.

data.title: Apple Had A Hush-Hush Relationship With Tesla's Chinese-Rival BYD For Now-Abandoned Car Plans — Cupertino Poured Nearly $1B Each Year For A Decade Into The Project
data.description: Apple reportedly had a secret partnership with Chinese automaker BYD to develop long-range EV batteries using lithium iron phosphate cells as part of its now-abandoned car project, which cost the tech giant about $1 billion annually over a decade.
